title: Login with OTP
description: As a customer, I want to login using OTP so that I can securely access my account.
acceptance_criteria: OTP is sent to registered mobile number; OTP expires after 5 minutes; Invalid OTP shows error message

title: Order Cancellation
description: As a customer, I want to cancel my order before preparation so that I can avoid unwanted purchases.
acceptance_criteria: Cancel allowed before preparation; Refund triggered after cancellation; Cancellation hidden after preparation starts

title: Profile Update
acceptance_criteria: Name and email can be updated
